issues.title: New tool: starlink-geoip-data
issues.author: clarkzjw
issues.body:
Proposed registry entry (to be added as `data/tools/starlink-geoip-data.yaml`):

```yaml
name: 'starlink-geoip-data'
class: 'Measurement'
subtype: 'Starlink GeoIP dataset, containing GeoFeed and PoP assignment snapshots, DNS PTR records, etc.'
domains:
- LEO
- Ground segment
url: https://github.com/clarkzjw/starlink-geoip-data
license: 'CC-BY-SA 4.0'
maintenance: active
publication: 'IETF IAB ip-geo workshop 2026'
contact: 'Jinwei Zhao (UVic PanLab)'
notes: 'GeoFeed snapshot archive since 2024-01; DNS PTR records since 2024-08; PoP assignment (pops.csv) archive since 2025-10; Starlink connected RIPE atlas probes and PeeringDB archive; GitHub stars (52)'
source: community
```
